title: [Zrenigotham House, Pond]
description: From the stillness of the water, the orchard surrounds you in a hush of moonlight and shadow.  Branches stretch above like dark lace against the sky, their reflections wavering softly around you.  The grassy shoreline forms a gentle rim, edged with wildflowers and fallen fruit that scent the cool night air.  Crickets sing from the trees, and the breeze stirs ripples that carry the hush of the orchard across the pond.
room.location: Zrenigotham House, inside the frontier town of Wehnimer's Landing
